name: generate-claude-md
summary: Author a CLAUDE.md for a repo — routing OS, not knowledge dump. Under 120 lines, references for detail.
when_to_use: Creating CLAUDE.md from scratch or consolidating a bloated existing one.

phases.name: Scan
steps: Run understand-codebase pack if not already done.
Identify stack (language, framework, DB, test runner, CI/CD).
Identify package manager + common commands (install, build, test, lint, typecheck).

phases.name: Draft sections
steps: Build & Test — one-line each for install/build/test/lint/typecheck.
Tech Stack — one line per layer.
Key Paths — source, tests, docs, config.
Conventions — pulled from lint config + observed patterns.
Don't Touch — auto-generated files, vendor dirs, lockfiles.

phases.name: Trim
steps: Count lines. If > 120: move anything >20 lines in a section to .claude/rules/{topic}.md and @-reference it.
Remove any content that's reference material (not routing).
Read it once fresh: can you navigate the repo from this CLAUDE.md?

phases.name: Add memory routing
steps: Add a Knowledge Library section pointing to Obsidian vault if applicable.
Add routing to skills/ subdirectories if stack-specific skills were generated.

exit_criteria: CLAUDE.md is ≤120 lines, routing-first, references for detail, loads every session without blowing budget.
anti_patterns: Convention lists that duplicate the linter config.
Inline examples that belong in references/.
No routing table — user can't tell where to go for what.
